hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | { read -r line; if [ -n "$line" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Warning: uncommitted changes exist. Consider committing before ending the session."}'; fi; } || true

hooks.prompt: Check if this file change violates any of these rules: 1) No print() in Python (must use structlog), 2) No console.log in TypeScript (must use proper logger), 3) No 'any' type in TypeScript, 4) No PII/transcripts/API keys in logs or comments, 5) No audio stored to disk. Tool input: $ARGUMENTS. If all rules pass, respond with this exact JSON: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "allow"}}. If a rule is violated, respond with: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "Describe the specific violation here"}}.

hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git\s+push\s+(origin\s+)?(main|master)\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct push to main/master is blocked. Create a feature branch and open a PR instead."}}'; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null && ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; } || true

hooks.statusMessage: Checking if PR needs to be created...

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Context compacted. Critical reminders: 1) JSONB mutation: always reassign whole dict. 2) asyncpg: CAST(:param AS jsonb) never ::jsonb. 3) Audio never to disk. 4) Evidence = {start_ms, end_ms} spans. 5) user_id filter on every query. 6) structlog only, never print(). 7) Next migration: 015."}'

denied=$(cat 2>/dev/null); tool=$(echo "$denied" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_name','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Action blocked by auto mode classifier: $tool. If this is legitimate, explain why and retry — or ask the user to approve it in /permissions.\"}"
echo '{"systemMessage": "Task created. Reminders before starting: next migration is 015, use CAST(:x AS jsonb) not ::jsonb, user_id filter on every query, structlog not print()."}'
